name: cut
description: Cut out selected portions of each line of a file

options.description: Byte positions as a comma or - separated list of numbers
Column positions as a comma or - separated list of numbers
Field positions as a comma or - separated list of numbers
Use delim as the field delimiter character instead of the tab character

arg.name: delim
arg.description: Field deliminator to use instead of the tab character

options.description: Suppress lines with no field delimiter characters.  unless specified, lines with no delimiters are passed through unmodified
Use whitespace (spaces and tabs) as the delimiter.  Consecutive spaces and tabs count as one single field separator
